linux.command:
echo '[1;36m >>> PLAYSTATION SYSTEM NEE EXTENDED EXPERIENCE RECURSIVE PROJECT <<<[0m' && cd ${workspaceFolder} && touch settings.h && /home/nic/.pico-sdk/ninja/v1.12.1/ninja -C build 2>&1 | tee /tmp/pico.log | sed -E -n 's/.*#pragma message: (.*)/  [1;34m»[0m [1;32m\1[0m/p; s/.*#error (.*)/  [1;31m✘ [ERREUR][0m \1/p; /error:|Building|Linking/p' | sed -E 's/STRING\(LED_PIN\)/16/g; s/STRING\(REQUEST_INJECT_TRIGGER\)/10/g; s/STRING\(REQUEST_INJECT_GAP\)/5/g; s/["'\''\)]//g' && if [ ${PIPESTATUS[0]} -eq 0 ]; then echo -e '
[1;32m[SUCCESS] Build finished![0m'; else echo -e '
[1;41m  BUILD FAILED  [0m'; fi

osx.command:
echo '[1;36m >>> PLAYSTATION SYSTEM NEE EXTENDED EXPERIENCE RECURSIVE PROJECT <<<[0m' && cd ${workspaceFolder} && touch settings.h && ${userHome}/.pico-sdk/ninja/v1.12.1/ninja -C build 2>&1 | tee /tmp/pico.log | sed -E -n 's/.*#pragma message: (.*)/  [1;34m»[0m [1;32m\1[0m/p; s/.*#error (.*)/  [1;31m✘ [ERREUR][0m \1/p; /error:|Building|Linking/p' | sed -E 's/STRING\(LED_PIN\)/16/g; s/STRING\(REQUEST_INJECT_TRIGGER\)/10/g; s/STRING\(REQUEST_INJECT_GAP\)/5/g; s/["'\''\)]//g' && if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then echo '
[1;32m[SUCCESS] Build finished![0m'; else echo '
[1;41m  BUILD FAILED  [0m'; fi

windows.command: echo [1;36m >>> PLAYSTATION SYSTEM NEE EXTENDED EXPERIENCE RECURSIVE PROJECT <<<[0m && cd /d ${workspaceFolder} && powershell -Command "(Get-Item settings.h).LastWriteTime = Get-Date" && (${env:USERPROFILE}/.pico-sdk/ninja/v1.12.1/ninja.exe -C build 2>&1 | tee build.log) && (powershell -Command "(Get-Content build.log) | ForEach-Object { $_ -replace '.*#pragma message: ', '  [1;34m»[0m [1;32m' -replace '.*#error ', '  [1;31m✘ [ERREUR][0m ' -replace 'STRING\(LED_PIN\)', '16' -replace 'STRING\(REQUEST_INJECT_TRIGGER\)', '10' -replace 'STRING\(REQUEST_INJECT_GAP\)', '5' -replace '[\"\)\']', '' } | Select-String '»', '✘', 'error:', 'Building', 'Linking' | Select-Object -Unique") && (findstr /C:"error:" build.log >nul && (echo. && echo [1;41m  BUILD FAILED  [0m) || (echo. && echo [1;32m[SUCCESS] Build finished![0m))

tasks.label: Flash
args: adapter speed 5000; program "${command:raspberry-pi-pico.launchTargetPath}" verify reset exit

tasks.label: RISC-V Reset (RP2350)
args: set USE_CORE { rv0 rv1 cm0 cm1 }
reset halt; targets rp2350.rv0; echo [format "Info : ARCHSEL_STATUS 0x%02x" [read_memory 0x4012015C 8 1]]; exit
